description: This is the second page of the same official FCC press release (a plain white document scan with minimal design). It continues the dense serif body text from the prior page, opening 'coverage will be complemented by new mid-band spectrum that boosts capacity and speeds—especially for fixed wireless to the home.' It then presents a bold-headed quote block, 'Chairman Carr issued the following statement:', with two paragraphs of direct quotation crediting President Trump for America 'leading the world again in next-gen technology' and describing the FCC's 'Build America agenda' two-part play (FCC auctions and secondary-market transactions) aimed at releasing approximately 300 megahertz of spectrum by the end of 2027. A further section headed 'Additional Background Information' lists bold bullet items: '5G Spectrum to AT&T,' 'D2D Spectrum to SpaceX,' 'A Future for Boost Mobile,' 'Tech-Neutral Innovation,' and 'Stringent Buildout Conditions,' each with explanatory text about EchoStar/AT&T/SpaceX spectrum deals. There is no illustration, photo, or meme styling. The propaganda function is in the text crediting the administration; it is an official document, not a designed graphic. Target audience: press and policy/industry observers.
notable_text: Chairman Carr issued the following statement: 'Thanks to President Trump, America is leading the world again in next-gen technology.'; Build America agenda; Additional Background Information
